comments.text:
👇 Everything we curated for this Greenland episode. Books, history, cultural resources, travel essentials.

*📚 BROWSE THE GREENLAND COLLECTION*
  ◦ Every book, history, and cultural item we'd recommend → https://shorturl.at/4XKG6

*🛍 SEE OUR FULL W.O.E. STOREFRONT*
  ◦ Every destination Collection in one place → https://www.amazon.com/shop/whereonearth

*🎟 TOURS AND EXPERIENCES IN GREENLAND*
  ◦ Iceberg cruises, dog sled tours, ice fjord excursions and more → https://shorturl.at/E836s
  ◦ Browse all Greenland experiences → https://gyg.me/y5YGs40j

*📖 PLAN YOUR GREENLAND TRIP*
  ◦ Bradt Greenland Travel Guide (2024 edition) → https://amzn.to/4nXYo9M
  ◦ An African in Greenland by Tété-Michel Kpomassie (NYRB Classics) → https://amzn.to/43z9ecG

*📚 GO DEEPER INTO GREENLAND*
  ◦ The Ice at the End of the World by Jon Gertner → https://amzn.to/4dzXqgk
  ◦ Smilla's Sense of Snow by Peter Høeg → https://amzn.to/4uCdQef

*🍲 BRING GREENLAND HOME*
  ◦ The Nordic Cookbook by Magnus Nilsson (Phaidon) → https://amzn.to/4wU8Enq
  ◦ Arctica: The Vanishing North by Sebastian Copeland → https://amzn.to/49rhqPF

comments.author: @FAIRUSE-t1v
comments.text:
Well considering how they’ve poisoned the waters and the Data Centers will take a lot of water 
We plan on melting the Ice Walls to get to what you couldn’t reach to pillage from the original people of the Earth that’s #Justice4JustUs

comments.author: @JonRaborn-gp4ff
comments.text: That then after visiting hired an few dog sled teams and mushed it up to that of the Great artic circle and the North Pole itself

comments.author: @JonRaborn-gp4ff
comments.text: That I found Greenland was an very interesting country including that of their at that time newly constructed super computer data centers

replies.author: @WhereonEarth4K
replies.text: The data center story really caught us off guard during research too. There's something almost poetic about it... using the Arctic cold as natural cooling for servers that connect the rest of the world. Greenland keeps revealing these unexpected layers. Glad that detail stood out to you.
